title: Value
description: A Mycelium value: a representation descriptor + a payload + metadata (RFC-0001 §4.2). The self-describing wire form is [Repr] || [Meta] || [payload], faithfully round-trippable: deserialize(serialize(v)) == v including Meta (RFC-0001 §4.8). This is the top-level data contract that Core IR (de)serialization (Phase-1 M-104) targets.

x-mycelium.$comment: `payload` encodings are representation-specific (binary words; trit sequences; scalar arrays; hypervector sparse/dense storage) and are defined per paradigm in Phase 1. The schema fixes only that a payload is present; well-formedness of payload-vs-repr is a code check (M-101).

payload.description: Representation-specific payload; type-checked against `repr` by the kernel (M-101), not by this schema.
payload.$comment: Intentionally unconstrained here (any JSON) — paradigm-specific payload schemas are layered in Phase 1.
